headline: Booking Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:BKNG) Screens as a Strong Growth Stock with a Promising Technical Setup
summary: Booking Holdings shows strong growth with 8/10 rating, solid profitability, and a promising technical setup rating of 7/10, offering potential for growth-focused investors.
